pages.text: The Vindicator Chef is a specially trained Vindicator — compared to their counterparts who only swing axes, their duty is to make food for other illagers — though their intelligence determines their cooking skills are not refined. However, it's worth noting that becoming a chef did not cause their muscles to atrophy; their threat level to you is the same as that of a Vindicator.
A chef with unrefined cooking skills, but still able to cleave open an enemy's skull!
